Container.Name: GarageStack
Container.Overview: GarageStack is an open-source vehicle monitoring dashboard for MG / SAIC electric, plug-in hybrid, and hybrid vehicles. It connects to the MG iSmart cloud via the SAIC MQTT Gateway and stores all data locally in an embedded PostgreSQL database. Features include: live dashboard, energy and efficiency statistics, trip history with heatmap visualisation, EV charging station overlay (requires free OCM API key), fuel station and motorway service area overlays (OpenStreetMap, no key required), Web Push notifications, and a Homepage dashboard widget. Everything runs in a single container -- no external database or MQTT broker required.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the GarageStack web interface. Open this in your browser.

Config.Name: MQTT Port
Config.Description: Host port for the internal Mosquitto MQTT broker. Leave blank (default) to keep the broker LAN-private. Only set if you need direct MQTT access from other devices.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the PostgreSQL database, MQTT data, application logs, and ASP.NET Data Protection keys. Back this up regularly.

Config.Name: MG iSmart Email
Config.Description: Your MG iSmart account email address. Must be the vehicle OWNER account -- shared or secondary accounts lack the write permissions needed to register alarm switches and will result in API error 1100003. Use a separate account on the MG phone app to avoid session conflicts.

Config.Name: MG Region
Config.Description: Region your vehicle is registered in: eu (Europe), cn (China), or row (Rest of World).

Config.Name: Database Password
Config.Description: Password for the embedded PostgreSQL database. If left empty a strong random password is auto-generated on first start and saved to /data/.postgres_password inside the data directory. Set explicitly only if you need to connect to the database directly with external tools. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 24

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret used to sign login tokens. Must be at least 32 characters. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: The exact URL you use to open GarageStack in your browser, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080. Must match exactly -- wrong value causes login to fail.

Config.Name: VAPID Public Key
Config.Description: VAPID public key for Web Push notifications. Leave empty to disable push notifications (the rest of the app works fine without them). Generate a key pair with: npx web-push generate-vapid-keys

Config.Name: VAPID Private Key
Config.Description: VAPID private key for Web Push notifications. Keep this secret.

Config.Name: Homepage Widget API Key
Config.Description: Static API key for the read-only /api/widget/{vin}/status endpoint used by the gethomepage.dev Custom API widget. Leave empty to keep the endpoint disabled. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: Open Charge Map API Key
Config.Description: API key for the EV charging station overlay on the map. Free to obtain at https://openchargemap.org/site/develop -- create an account and generate a key. Leave empty to disable the charging station feature.

Config.Name: Overpass API Base URL
Config.Description: Overpass API endpoint used for fuel station and motorway service area overlays. Defaults to the public endpoint -- no API key required. Change this only if you self-host an Overpass instance.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database name. Only change this if you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: Database User
Config.Description: PostgreSQL database user. Only change this if you know what you are doing.
